title: The Raid Turns Across Onigashima
description: On pages 14–16, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Kaido, Unknown person #14, Luffy, Unknown person #15, Straw Hat Pirates as Battles spread through the Skull Dome while Tama, Chopper, Marco, and the alliance shift the momentum.
scene: Across the Skull Dome, the alliance fights to survive while Tama, Chopper, Marco, and the Straw Hats change the flow of battle.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I can control it better now!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: When I first met Luffy and his crew,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I would turn into a Dragon whenever I was startled or anxious!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You sure startled me! That was similar to my father's power.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If I could turn into a monster like that,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I would actually be useful to the others!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I wonder if Luffy is doing okay. I wish I could help take down kaido, as Oden!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: But he's as high- spirited as ever!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: HUH!? Wait, momonosuke- sama, how do you know that?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: How do we win against these mon-sters?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: None of our attacks are working!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've hit them so many times, they HAVE to be feeling it!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Honestly, after all this, I'm surprised he still considers them human.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, a losing attitude isn't going to help, is it?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You should help us come up with something then!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: We need to split them up!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I guess I've been to hell and back a few times now!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your eyes never seem to lose their fire!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War storyline through 45 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
